description: The ProtoFluxNodeVisual component is used to manage the visuals and interaction with ProtoFlux nodes when they are unpacked.

fields.Node: The protoflux node this is a visual for.
fields.IsSelected: Whether or not this node is selected.
fields.IsHighlighted: Whether or not this node is highlighted.
fields._nodeHoverArea: The Hover interaction area for this visual.
fields._bgImage: The background image for tye protoflux visual.
fields._inputsRoot: The root of the different slots for node inputs.
fields._outputsRoot: The root of the different slots for node outputs.
fields._referencesRoot: The slot for references to other nodes like arrows for protoflux variables/globals.
fields._overviewVisual: The field for enabling the overview alt version of this node.
fields._overviewBg: The BG color of the overview version of the visual.
fields._labelBg: The enabled field of the label BG.
fields._labelText: The enabled field of the label text.
